hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; git pull --rebase --no-edit >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; exit 0

cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; git add -A; if git diff --cached --quiet; then exit 0; fi; git commit -m "auto: synchronisation des modifications" >/dev/null 2>&1; if git pull --rebase --no-edit >/dev/null 2>&1 && git push >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo '{"systemMessage":"Modifications synchronisees sur GitHub"}'; else echo '{"systemMessage":"Synchro GitHub echouee (conflit ou reseau) - a verifier"}'; fi; exit 0
